name_en: [Blue D Embroidery with Leather Patch and Strap New Size]
name_cn:
[Blue D Embroidery with Leather Patch and Strap New Size]
Dior Mini Book Tote
A retro and stylish item for posing♡ The exquisite embroidery perfectly presents a look that adds highlights to your outfit with just a casual carry~ This mini size is so cute! A small bag shape is also very convenient for carrying small odds and ends~ Whoever uses it is stylish, a must-have for pretty fairies who love high appearance.
Style No.: 1265/1286
Dimensions: 26.5×21×14cm
